description: Classic and modern rock anthems that defined generations. From hard-hitting riffs to unforgettable solos.
Deep, soulful blues from the legends. Raw emotion and storytelling through guitar and voice.
High voltage, high energy. The heaviest and loudest rock tracks for when you need to turn it up.
Heavy, loud, and unapologetic. Pure metal from the greatest bands ever to plug in.
Timeless soul and R&B classics. Smooth, emotional and deeply human music that hits different.
